title: GateResult
description: Output of a verification gate (Tier 1 per-stage or Tier 2 integration). Captures pass/fail status, individual check results, error classification, and timing.

passed.description: Whether all checks in this gate passed.

tier.description: Gate tier: 1 (per-stage, fast) or 2 (integration, full CI).

checks.description: Individual check results within this gate.

error_output.description: Raw error output captured from the verification container. Full content stored in S3; truncated here.

error_category.description: Error classification used to route the retry strategy. Empty string when gate passed.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the gate execution in milliseconds.

GateCheck.title: GateCheck
GateCheck.description: Result of a single check within a gate (e.g. typecheck, lint, route_conflicts).

output.description: Brief error or success message from this check.
